title: reshapes
description: This mod adds a wider variety of accessories to the game. Players can reshape themselves and boost their stats with these accessories.
body:
Reshaping (Accessory Remake)
Reshaping is an accessory mod that introduces a deeply customizable RPG‑style accessory system to Minecraft. Featuring extensive stat bonuses, unique passive effects, and highly challenging god‑tier accessories, it completely reinvents your survival gameplay.

✨ Core Features
1. Vast Accessory Library
The mod adds dozens of functionally distinct accessories covering combat, survival, exploration and more:
• Necklace: e.g., Poseidon’s Necklace (Water Breathing + Swimming Speed Boost), Shadow Necklace (Night Vision in Low Light + High Armor)
• Ring: e.g., Poison‑Heal Ring (Converts Poison Damage to Health Regeneration)
1. One‑of‑a‑Kind God‑Tier Accessories
   
The mod includes endgame gear with complex mechanics:

• Solar Ring: An supreme ring with 9 unique abilities! It alters your health and attack power based on day‑night cycles, turning you into a war god amid flames—yet cursed with increased hunger and item incineration upon death.
• Reshaping Ring: The true core of the RPG experience. Its bonuses scale with your death count, experience level, and even the number of negative buffs on you. A symbol of power, yet an unremovable shackle.

🌍 Exploration & Balance
• Nether Fortresses & Bastions: Rare accessories have a 1% chance to spawn in chests.
• End Cities: High 5% drop rate for high‑tier accessories.
• Power vs. Cost: More powerful accessories often come with severe debuffs such as being unremovable and harsh death penalties. Choose your power wisely.

🛠️ Technical Details
• Supported Version: 1.20.1 (ongoing updates)
• Dependencies:
Curios API (Forge)
• Compatibility: Fully compatible with mainstream RPG mods. Underlying optimizations for stat bonuses prevent damage overflow and attribute conflicts.

🚀 Why Download Reshaping?
If vanilla Minecraft survival feels too plain, or you want to add a deeper, more progressive gear system to your modpack, Reshaping is your perfect choice. Every accessory is carefully crafted to offer unique tactical options.
